title: Starting BarkinMad Studios
content: BarkinMad Studios was founded in August 2025 with a simple goal: create enjoyable mobile apps and games that focus on quality, accessibility, and long-term support.

The studio began as an independent development project driven by a passion for technology, software development, and gaming. Rather than chasing trends, the aim was to build products that people would genuinely find useful and enjoyable.
From the beginning, the focus was on creating applications for iPhone and iPad, taking advantage of modern mobile technology while keeping user experience at the centre of every project.

One of the guiding principles behind BarkinMad Studios is that software should be approachable. Whether it's a productivity app, a sports application, or a retro-inspired game, the experience should be simple to understand and enjoyable to use.

The first projects focused on solving real-world problems and exploring ideas that could grow into a wider portfolio of apps and games. These early experiments helped establish development processes, shared technology, and design principles that continue to be used today.

As development continued, the studio expanded into retro-inspired gaming. Drawing inspiration from classic arcade machines and home computer games, the goal became combining the simplicity of classic gameplay with the convenience and features expected by modern mobile players.
Every project contributes to the long-term vision of BarkinMad Studios: creating software that is fun, useful, reliable, and accessible to players and users around the world.
While the studio is still at the beginning of its journey, the foundations established during 2025 continue to shape every new app, feature, and game released under the BarkinMad Studios name.
